summary: Seller Performance Management System Testing Complete - All features working. Backend APIs (22/22 tests passed after fixing timezone bug). Frontend shows Admin Performance Panel with Daily Tracking, Leaderboard, Earnings & Payout, Motivation Quotes tabs. Seller Performance Panel shows rank, score, and activity history.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Timezone bug in seller_performance.py - login_time from MongoDB was offset-naive while 'now' was offset-aware, causing TypeError in working hours calculation. Added timezone handling: if login_time.tzinfo is None: login_time = login_time.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
Commission slabs correctly implemented per user requirements (₹10k-14.9k=₹500 up to ₹105k-150k=₹10,000)
Performance scoring formula correctly implemented: (Properties shared × 1) + (Visits × 5) + (Deals × 20) with bonuses/penalties
Role-based access control working - sellers cannot access admin endpoints (returns 403)
seed_data_creation: Test motivation quotes created during testing (prefixed with TEST)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seller Performance Management System is fully functional. All backend APIs work correctly. Frontend panels for both admin and seller are working. Daily Start/End modals work. Leaderboard shows daily and monthly rankings. Earnings & Payout shows seller bonuses with mark as paid functionality.

Backend_daily_start.details: Accepts selfie (base64), today_plan, planned_visits, expected_deals. Prevents duplicate submissions.

Backend_daily_end.details: Accepts clients_called, visits_booked, deals_closed, properties_shared, tomorrow_visits. Returns score breakdown. Fixed timezone bug.

Backend_my_performance.details: Returns today stats, monthly stats, rank, predictions for earnings

Backend_activity_history.details: Returns list of daily activities with scores

Backend_admin_sellers_tracking.details: Returns all sellers' tracking data for a date with login/logout times, calls, shared, visits, deals, score, status

Backend_admin_leaderboard_daily.details: Returns daily leaderboard sorted by score

Backend_admin_leaderboard_monthly.details: Returns monthly leaderboard with performance tags and bonuses

Backend_admin_earnings.details: Returns seller earnings with performance_bonus, high_performer_bonus, payout_status

Backend_admin_mark_paid.details: Marks sellers as paid for a month

Backend_admin_seller_detail.details: Returns detailed seller info with activities and stats

Frontend_Admin_Seller_Performance_Tab.details: Tab visible in navigation with Trophy icon. Shows Daily Tracking, Leaderboard, Earnings & Payout, Motivation Quotes sub-tabs.

Frontend_Admin_Daily_Tracking.details: Shows date picker, summary stats (On Time, Late Login, Absent, Warnings), and tracking table with all seller data

Frontend_Admin_Leaderboard.details: Shows Today's Leaderboard and Monthly Leaderboard side by side with rank, name, score, deals

Frontend_Admin_Earnings_Payout.details: Shows month picker, Mark All Pending as Paid button, and earnings table with Login Days, Score, Deals, Perf. Bonus, High Perf., Total Bonus, Status, Action

Frontend_Admin_Motivation_Quotes.details: Shows Add Quote button, existing quotes with delete option. Add Quote modal has Quote, Author, Specific Date fields.

Frontend_Admin_Seller_Detail_Modal.details: Shows seller stats (Login Days, Attendance %, Total Score, Status) and Recent Activity list

Frontend_Seller_Performance_Tab.details: Shows My Performance header with rank and monthly score, performance tag badge

Frontend_Seller_Performance_Overview.details: Shows Properties Shared, Visits Booked, Deals Closed, Login Days with progress bars and targets

Frontend_Seller_Todays_Stats.details: Shows Today's Score, Shared, Visits, Deals. Also shows scoring formula explanation.

Frontend_Seller_Earnings.details: Shows Performance Bonus (100 pts = ₹50), High Performer Bonus, Total Bonus Earnings, and commission structure

Frontend_Seller_History.details: Shows activity history with date, shared, visits, deals, and daily score

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes in daily-end endpoint
bug_fixed.root_cause: login_time from MongoDB was stored without timezone info (offset-naive) while datetime.now(timezone.utc) is offset-aware
bug_fixed.fix: Added timezone handling: if login_time.tzinfo is None: login_time = login_time.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - seller performance data stored in MongoDB collections: seller_daily_activity, seller_monthly_performance, seller_payouts, motivation_quotes
